SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.elf.machines.mips

Class ElfAbiFlags_Mips

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.elf.ElfSection
net.boricj.bft.elf.machines.mips.ElfAbiFlags_Mips
All Implemented Interfaces:
StreamWritable, Writable
public class ElfAbiFlags_Mips extends ElfSection
MIPS ABI flags section containing architecture-specific ABI information. This section describes the MIPS ISA level, register sizes, floating-point ABI, and other flags.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class net.boricj.bft.elf.ElfSection

    SHN_ABS, SHN_COMMON, SHN_LORESERVE, SHN_UNDEF, SHN_XINDEX

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ElfAbiFlags_Mips(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addralign, byte[] bytes)
    Creates a new MIPS ABI flags section.
    ElfAbiFlags_Mips(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addralign, long entsize, byte[] bytes)
    Creates a new MIPS ABI flags section with entry size.
    ElfAbiFlags_Mips(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize)
    Creates a new MIPS ABI flags section with full parameters.

    Parses a MIPS ABI flags section from an input stream.

  • Constructor Details

    • ElfAbiFlags_Mips

      public ElfAbiFlags_Mips(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addralign, byte[] bytes)
      Creates a new MIPS ABI flags section.
      Parameters:
      elf - the parent ELF file
      name - section name
      flags - section flags
      addralign - address alignment
      bytes - initial content (unused)

    • ElfAbiFlags_Mips

      public ElfAbiFlags_Mips(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addralign, long entsize, byte[] bytes)
      Creates a new MIPS ABI flags section with entry size.
      Parameters:
      elf - the parent ELF file
      name - section name
      flags - section flags
      addralign - address alignment
      entsize - entry size
      bytes - initial content (unused)

    • ElfAbiFlags_Mips

      public ElfAbiFlags_Mips(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize)
      Creates a new MIPS ABI flags section with full parameters.
      Parameters:
      elf - the parent ELF file
      name - section name
      flags - section flags
      addr - virtual address
      offset - file offset
      addralign - address alignment
      entsize - entry size

    • ElfAbiFlags_Mips

      public ElfAbiFlags_Mips(ElfFile elf, ElfFile.Parser parser, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long size, int link, int info, long addralign, long entsize) throws IOException
      Parses a MIPS ABI flags section from an input stream.
      Parameters:
      elf - the parent ELF file
      parser - parser containing input stream
      flags - section flags
      addr - virtual address
      offset - file offset
      size - section size
      link - link to another section
      info - additional section information
      addralign - address alignment
      entsize - entry size
      Throws:
      IOException - if reading fails
